'''wadhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:backcast|backcast]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-dh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:backcast|backcast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wadhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:wadhate|wadhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wadhatesher|wadhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wadhatesherĂ«m|wadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wadhatero|wadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wadhateshĂ«|wadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wadhateshĂ«m|wadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwadhatero|gokiwadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwadhateshĂ«|gokiwadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwadhateshĂ«m|gokiwadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowadhankerom|gowadhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowadhankeshĂ«|gowadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowadhankeshĂ«m|gowadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowadhankeya|gowadhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wadhaterom|wadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wadhatemu|wadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wadhateya|wadhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwadhaterom|gokiwadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwadhatemu|gokiwadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwadhateya|gokiwadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wadhadhate|wadhadhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wadhadhatesher|wadhadhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wadhadhatesherĂ«m|wadhadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wadhadhatero|wadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wadhadhateshĂ«|wadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wadhadhateshĂ«m|wadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwadhadhatero|gokiwadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwadhadhateshĂ«|gokiwadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwadhadhateshĂ«m|gokiwadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowadhadhankerom|gowadhadhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowadhadhankeshĂ«|gowadhadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowadhadhankeshĂ«m|gowadhadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowadhadhankeya|gowadhadhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wadhadhaterom|wadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wadhadhatemu|wadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wadhadhateya|wadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwadhadhaterom|gokiwadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwadhadhatemu|gokiwadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwadhadhateya|gokiwadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠdhĂŠte|wĂŠdhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠdhĂŠtesher|wĂŠdhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠdhĂŠtero|wĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠdhĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠdhĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠdhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠdhĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠdhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠdhĂŠterom|wĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠdhĂŠtemu|wĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠdhĂŠteya|wĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠdhĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠdhĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠdhĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafdhafte|wafdhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafdhaftesher|wafdhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafdhaftesherĂ«m|wafdhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafdhaftero|wafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafdhafteshĂ«|wafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafdhafteshĂ«m|wafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafdhaftero|gokiwafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafdhafteshĂ«|gokiwafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafdhafteshĂ«m|gokiwafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafdhafnkerom|gowafdhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafdhafnkeshĂ«|gowafdhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafdhafnkeshĂ«m|gowafdhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafdhafnkeya|gowafdhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafdhafterom|wafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafdhaftemu|wafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafdhafteya|wafdhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafdhafterom|gokiwafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafdhaftemu|gokiwafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafdhafteya|gokiwafdhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
